content: Self-Refine's single-perspective iterative refinement framework can be upgraded by integrating the multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a multi-perspective Self-Refine framework that retains Self-Refine's core advantage of no additional training or supervision. This hybrid approach would resolve the limitation of single-perspective blind spots that plagues original Self-Refine, by triggering self-correction through cross-perspective inconsistencies rather than only relying on the same model's static feedback loop.
